case_title: LUJAN, PHILLIP VS THE ALHAMBRA LLC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUJAN, PHILLIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE ALHAMBRA LLC $1,027.68 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,049.68, THE COURT UNDERSTANDS THAT THE DEFENDANT CONTINUES TO OFFER A NET REDUCTION BETWEEN $100 TO $150 PER MONTH UNTIL THE WATER LEAK IN APT #502 IS FULLY REPAIRED AND NO LONGER LEAKS INTO APT #402. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE ALHAMBRA LLC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT THE ALHAMBRA LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LUJAN, PHILLIP AS TO DEFENDANT THE ALHAMBRA LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
